name: Chinese Hot and Spicy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate for 15-20 minutes in a mixture of ginger, sherry, and light soy sauce.
2. Cut scallion and hot peppers diagonally into 1-inch pieces.
3. Grind anise pepper to powder.
4. Mix together chicken broth, light soy sauce, wine vinegar, sugar, salt, and ground anise pepper (or more).
5. Heat oil in a pan.
6. Add scallion and stir-fry several times until slightly golden.
7. Add ginger, sherry, and the marinade mixture to the scallions and hot peppers; continue stir-frying for 1-2 minutes.
8. Pour in the chicken broth mixture and mix well.
9. Cook over low heat until the chicken pieces are tender.
10. Stir in cornstarch to thicken the sauce, if desired.
11. Serve.
